description: Address review feedback: fix CI test summary to parse Surefire reports, tighten alarm action assertions, and make retry MaxAttempts extraction robust
steps: Fix .github/workflows/ci.yml Test Summary step to parse target/surefire-reports/ instead of re-running mvn test
Update ObservabilityTest.java alarm action tests to use Match.arrayWith(List.of(Match.anyValue())) to verify at least one action exists
Update AdvancedErrorHandlingTest.java testPutMetadataRecordRetryConfiguration to add null-check for MaxAttempts and extract from the single retrier containing all 3 error types
Run mvn test to confirm all tests pass
acceptance_criteria: CI Test Summary step does not re-run mvn test
Alarm action tests verify array has at least one entry
Retry test has null-check for MaxAttempts and extracts from the combined retrier
verification: Run mvn test and confirm all tests pass
